name: vibesearch
description: VibeSearch keeps one scoreboard: the real questions your business should be the answer to, and who currently owns each one. Seven commands: the coach picks today's move, start builds your board, map grows and probes it, win takes a question and ships a self-tested, paste-ready answer, fix repairs what's already live, local runs GBP and service-area work, watch confirms wins and flags stale content. Zero dependencies, no OAuth, honest search-visibility probing only.
